description_long: This is a simple, round wooden stool with a flat, circular seat and three straight legs. The legs are evenly spaced and extend vertically from the seat to the ground, providing stable support. The wood has a natural, slightly weathered finish, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. There are no visible decorative elements, backrest, or footrest, emphasizing its minimalist design. The stool appears sturdy and functional, suitable for use in public spaces such as parks, bus stops, or urban plazas. Its neutral color and straightforward construction allow it to blend seamlessly into various urban environments.
description: A round, wooden stool with three straight legs and a flat seat, featuring a rustic, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat and three evenly spaced legs, with the left leg slightly more visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the central leg and the right leg more prominently.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 1, with the central leg and left leg more visible.
description_view_3: View showing the central leg directly in front, with the other two legs symmetrically behind.
